json_data.title: CPU Scheduling Algorithms
json_data.reason: Understanding how processes are scheduled provides context for how memory resources are utilized and contended for by active programs.

json_data.title: Cache Coherence Protocols
json_data.reason: This topic extends the understanding of memory hierarchies and performance optimization to multi-processor systems, building on the concept of associative memory.

json_data.title: Persistent Memory Programming Models
json_data.reason: This explores how new non-volatile memory technologies are changing fundamental assumptions about memory hierarchies and allocation, posing new research challenges.
